positive: Minimalist celestial fox silhouette, leaping over stylized mountain peaks and crescent moons. The fox is depicted in a dynamic, flowing posture against a deep indigo and royal purple cosmic gradient background. Elements include bioluminescent nebulae swirls, abstract constellations, and floating geometric shapes like octahedrons. High contrast, clean vector art style, graphic novel aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, strong silhouette edges, crisp linework, magical and serene mood. Aspect ratio square, bright ambient light source simulating distant starlight, designed for t-shirt print.
negative: blur, grainy, noisy, photorealism, complex anatomy, messy, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, bad composition, extra limbs, low detail, copyright, anime, realism
